folio.label: 200v
folio.l: ¢ This Maximus , that sey this thyng betide

note.notetxt: 400Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Witú pitous teeres , tolde it a noon rigút
That he here soules saw , to heuene glide
Witú Aungeles , ful of cleernesse , and of ligút
And witú his word , conuäted many a wygút
For whicú , Almachius , dide hi~ so to bete
W whippe of leed , til he his lyf gan lete
Cecile hi~ took , and buried hi~ a noon

note.notetxt: 407Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: By Tiburce , and valerian softly
W Inne hire buriynge place , vnder the stoon
And after this , Almachius hastily
Bad hise Mynystres , fecchen openly
Cecile , so æ she mygúte , in his päsence
Doon sacrifise , and Iubiter encence
¢ But they conuäted , at hire wyse loore

note.notetxt: 414Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Wepten ful sore , and ©auen ful credence
Vn to hire word , and cryden moore & moore
Crist goddes sone , w outen difference
Is verray god , this is al oure sentence
That hatú so good a êuau~t , hi~ to serue
This , witú o vois , we trowen , thougú we sterue
Almachius , that herde of this doynge

note.notetxt: 421Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Bad fecchen Cecile , æ he mygúte hire se
And alderfiirst lo , this was his axynge

note.notetxt: alderfurst423 There appear to be two dots above the u in this word. Perhaps it should be transcribed as two i's.Est

folio.l: What maner wo~man , artow quod he
I am a gentil wo~man , born~ , quod she
I axe the quod he , thougú it the greeue
Of thy religion , and of thy byleue
¢ Why tha~ne bygan , ©oure questiou~ folily

note.notetxt: 428 Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.Est

folio.l: Quod she , æ woldest two answeres co~clude
In oo demaunde , ©e axed lewedly
Almache answerde , vn to æ similitude
Of whe~nes cometú , thyn answeryng so rude
Of whennes quod she , whan æ she was freyned
Of Conscience , and of good feitú vnfeyned
Almachius seyde , ne takestow noon heede

note.notetxt: 435Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Of my power , and she answerde hi~ this
ñoure mygút quod she , ful litel is to drede
For euäy mortal ma~nes power , nys
But like a bladdre , ful of wynd I wys
For w a nedles poynt , whan it is blowe
May al the boost of it , be leid ful lowe
¢ Ful wrongfully , bygonne æè quod he

note.notetxt: 442Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP
